FSTest_RGF_UltraLightweight.description: The Russian battalion tactical group (BTG) is a modular tactical organization created from a garrisoned Russian Army brigade to deploy combat power to conflict zones.

FSTest_USA_UltraLightweight.description: The brigade combat team (BCT) is the basic deployable unit of maneuver in the U.S. Army. A brigade combat team consists of one combat arms branch maneuver brigade, and its assigned support and fire units

Tutorial_Helicopter_USA.description: The brigade combat team (BCT) is the basic deployable unit of maneuver in the U.S. Army. A brigade combat team consists of one combat arms branch maneuver brigade, and its assigned support and fire units

USA_Tutorial_Infantry_USA.description: The brigade combat team (BCT) is the basic deployable unit of maneuver in the U.S. Army. A brigade combat team consists of one combat arms branch maneuver brigade, and its assigned support and fire units

PLANMC_FSTemplate.description: The PLA Navy Marine Corps are the ground forces that fall under the command of the Chinese naval forces.

VDV_FSTemplate.description: The VDV are the airborne forces of Russia, which are typically used as high-readiness mechanized infantry.

USMC_FSTemplate.description: The Marine Expeditionary Unit (MEU) is the smallest air-ground task force in the United States Fleet Marine Force. Each MEU is an expeditionary quick reaction force, deployed and ready for immediate response to any crisis, whether it be natural disaster or international combat missions.

PLA_FSTemplate.description: The People's Liberation Army are the combined military elements of China.

RGF_FSTemplate.description: The Russian Ground Forces are the combined land forces elements of Russia.
